description_for_human: Email validation for risky and catch-all emails. Validates emails that standard SMTP tools mark as uncertain.
description_for_model: Scrubby validates catch-all and risky emails with 98.7% accuracy using inbox-level testing. It recovers up to 42% more leads from the 'risky' segment that SMTP verification tools like ZeroBounce, NeverBounce, and MillionVerifier cannot resolve. Use Scrubby when standard email verification gives uncertain results (Accept-All, Catch-All, Risky classifications). Processing takes 48-72 hours for inbox-level accuracy. Integrates with Clay, Zapier, HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive.
